name: Tostada Pie
recipeIngredient: 2 teaspoons olive oil or vegetable oil
recipeInstructions:
Serves 4 to 5
1. In a large skillet, sauté onion in hot oil until softened.
2. Add ground beef, chili powder, cumin, salt, and garlic (or garlic powder). Cook until the beef is browned, stirring occasionally.
3. Stir in tomato sauce and black olives. Heat through.
4. Prepare foil handles by tearing three 20 x 3-inch strips of heavy-duty aluminum foil or using regular foil folded to double thickness.
5. Place one buttered corn tortilla on a foil handle, with the butter side up.
6. Spread meat sauce evenly over the tortilla and add a layer of shredded cheese.
7. Repeat steps 4-6, ending with a layer of cheese on top.
8. Cover with another tortilla, more sauce, and cheese.
9. Cover with foil; cook in a Crock-Pot on HIGH for 1 hour.
10. Carefully remove the dish from the Crock-Pot using the foil handles.
11. Discard the foil handles.
12. Cut into wedges and serve with sour cream and minced green onion if desired.
Note: To make the handles, crisscross the foil strips in a spoke design for easy removal from the Crock-Pot.
